creator: db@db.net
text:
On Mon, Nov 13, 2006 at 02:41:10PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of science/py-scipy,
>
> Please note that PR ports/105479 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105479
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

As discussed on IRC already and lots of e-mails, APPROVED.
